rows.label: qev025113_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ohh! You're the one from before!
Your name was... [ST:playername ], right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0002
rows.name:
You came at just the right time.
Could you help me with one more job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0003
rows.name:
I have to bury this Ma-non's
corpse, but it's quite the heavy
labor, so I was having trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask exactly whose corpse that is.

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0021
rows.name: Refuse Powell's offer.

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0004
rows.name:
Ah... It's Aqual. The worst, most gluttonous
Ma-non, even though he's a BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0005
rows.name:
You were helping with this guy's
investigation, weren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0006
rows.name:
Now that I think about it, you're just
like this despicable bastard, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0007
rows.name:
Come to think of it, you were helping
with Aqual's investigation, weren't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0008
rows.name:
How dare you buddy up with such a despicable
Ma-non and try to get in my way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Haha! Hahahahahahahahahah! You
slowpoke! You were one step too late![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0010
rows.name:
Aqual ate my special Grenade
Pizza and kicked the bucket!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hahahahahahah!! What a completely idiotic
bunch! The moment they see pizza, they
eat it without even being suspicious![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0012
rows.name:
A concentrated drop of cheese, salami... and
that very stimulating special ingredient straight
into the stomach of the one who eats it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0013
rows.name:
Duduma, Gerome, Yuyu,
and Aqual... Fuhaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0014
rows.name:
Everyone, everyone! They all ate
the Grenade Pizza and died!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0015
rows.name:
That's right! I am the true culprit
behind the case you were pursuing! I
was the special main dish all along![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0030
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0031
rows.name: Calm your mind and ask for his motive.

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0040
rows.name: Enrage

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0041
rows.name: Condemn Powell, letting your welling emotions take over.

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0016
rows.name:
Haha! I can see it. The soul suffering and
screaming deep beneath your calmness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0017
rows.name:
Very well, I'll tell you as a
souvenir for the afterlife.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0018
rows.name:
That's right! Get angry! Cry and scream!
Taste the suffering of one who has lost
something precious with your entire body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0019
rows.name:
Haha! I'll tell you the
sin they committed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0020
rows.name: You Ma-non... Aqual... Killed my wife![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0021
rows.name:
Even in death, that sin cannot be
fully atoned for. I'll poison him
to death once more in hell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0023
rows.name: Hey, you're equally guilty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0024
rows.name:
Hah! I don't care if you're a BLADE
or what, curse your own frivolity
for accepting this guy's job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Who's the blockhead, Powell?
Your confession just now... I
made sure to record it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0027
rows.name: Huh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0028
rows.name:
Didn't you hear me? I'm saying
you're the blockhead... Idiot!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0029
rows.name: Wha!! You... Why!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0050
rows.name: Snoop

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0051
rows.name: Question if Aqual truly murdered Powell's wife.

rows.label: qev025113_JNK0060
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev025113_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask if Aqual didn't eat the poisoned pizza.

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0030
rows.name:
That can't be true! Powell must have
made a terrible misunderstanding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0031
rows.name:
Misunderstanding! What the
hell are you talking about![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0032
rows.name:
Day after day... my wife was
cornered by you Ma-non... And
Aqual! You dealt the final blow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey! Have you forgotten that you
told her to replace the pizza over
a mere 3 slices of salami! Hey![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0034
rows.name:
What kind of nonsense are you talking
about? More importantly, do you
understand your current position?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Guh!! Why the hell are you
perfectly fine! You definitely
took a bite of the Grenade Pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0036
rows.name:
Th... That's right! I definitely
saw you take a bite of the pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0038
rows.name: Heheh, this is all thanks to you, ne?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0039
rows.name:
Gerome's corpse, left perfectly
intact... The poisoned pizza was
discovered inside his body, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0040
rows.name:
So I thought it was suspicious, and
after doing various investigations...
Duduma, Gerome, and Yuyu-chan, too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0041
rows.name:
I found out they had all made
an order call to Army Pizza
before passing away, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0042
rows.name:
Guh... To be set up by
a Ma-non like you...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0043
rows.name:
That's right, Powell. In Earthling
words, this is what you call "the
time to pay your dues," right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0044
rows.name: ...You Ma-non are always like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0045
rows.name:
Weaseling your way into Earthlings'
lives with your filthy methods...
And messing everything up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0046
rows.name:
I won't forgive you... The life
of my wife that you stole... You'll
pay for it with your deaths![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0047
rows.name:
Back when I was in the military, I was feared
as the Hellfire Margherita. You'd best savor
my terrifying power to the fullest!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0048
rows.name: [ST:playername ]! You really came at a good time, yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025113_MSG0049
rows.name:
Well then, let's take Powell down!
This is to avenge Yuyu-chan... and
everyone else he killed, sa![ST:wait ]
